description: Lock the Uraniborg instrument-program and Tycho star-catalog path to pre-telescopic calibrated naked-eye observations and 1602 print publication.

checks.reason: The corrected calibration scope is anchored to Tycho's 1582 large mural quadrant and associated Uraniborg measurement methods.
The corrected observatory-program scope is anchored to Tycho's 1582 Uraniborg instrument program rather than later telescope observing.
The scoped Tycho 777-star catalog was printed in 1602.
Tycho's program extended earlier naked-eye astronomical observation traditions.
The Uraniborg observatory program depended on calibrated, stable, repeatable instruments and measurement methods.
Tycho's star catalog was produced from the Uraniborg observatory measurement program.
The scoped catalog is anchored to printed publication in 1602.
The corrected Uraniborg observatory program predates the telescope.
The corrected Uraniborg observatory program is not a Lincei/Galileo scientific-society publication network.
Tycho's 1602 star catalog was based on pre-telescopic observatory measurements.
